item.name: Anachrony
item.comment: Not what I was expecting. Does not give a WOW factor. I thing it just aged badly. There are many more exciting worker placement games. Will keep it in collection for now. Maybe more plays with the advanced setting will provide more fun.

item.name: Aye, Dark Overlord! The Red Box
Baza Shackleton: Podbój Kosmosu
item.originalname: Shackleton Base: A Journey to the Moon

item.name: Betrayal at House on the Hill: 3rd Edition
Detective: A Modern Crime Board Game
Kutná Hora: Miasto srebra
item.originalname: Kutná Hora: The City of Silver

item.name: Lisboa: Queen Variant
item.comment: I love it. In my games the usual ending was everyone fishing for decree cards. This variant changes it by removing the action to gain a decree in a random moment of 2nd era. Decree cards, previously largely ignored in early stage of the game become crucial to get the most likely to score well as early as possible.

item.name: Lockup: Opowieści ze świata Roll Player
Star Wars: Bitwa o Hoth
item.comment: Quick to learn, card based with a significant luck factor. Battles are very fast paced and most end within 30 min. including teach. Tremendous fun.

item.name: Terraforming Mars: Ares Expedition – Discovery · Foundations · Crisis
Through the Ages: A New Story of Civilization
Through the Ages: New Leaders and Wonders
Tide of Iron: Days of the Fox
Władca Pierścieni: Pojedynek o Śródziemie
item.originalname: The Lord of the Rings: Duel for Middle-earth
